visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an outdoor urban street setting under natural daylight. A woman with dark hair, wearing a beige Adidas cap and a white zip-up hoodie, stands centrally, talking energetically to the camera with animated hand gestures. Two other women stand beside her, partially obscured. The background features blurred city buildings, traffic signals, and street signs. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor laboratory or factory setting with bright studio lighting. A man in professional protective gear, including a hairnet and mask, stands in a clean, white-walled room equipped with stainless steel cabinets, lab monitors, and organized shelves of containers. He gestures towards the equipment while a woman in a hairnet listens. (3) A close-up shot focuses on a large stainless steel vat where a clear, viscous liquid is being poured from a smaller container. A mechanical stirring rod rotates inside the vat, creating ripples in the liquid. The surrounding environment is a clean industrial space with white surfaces and workers in blue protective suits. (4) The camera captures technical testing equipment in a lab. A robotic probe from a Brookfield Ametek viscometer descends into a small white plastic tube filled with a dense white cream. The digital display on the machine shows measurement parameters. The lighting is bright and even. (5) The visual transitions to an automated bottling line. Small red bottles with white dropper caps move along a circular white turntable. Red laser sensors blink as the bottles pass under a mechanical arm that dispenses liquid or checks levels. The movement is precise and rhythmic. (6) In another production phase, bright teal-colored plastic spray bottles move along a conveyor belt. A mechanical capping station presses white spray heads onto the bottles. A worker in blue gloves is briefly visible handling the bottles. (7) Back in the lab, the woman from the first phase, now wearing a hairnet and white coat, inspects the teal bottles. She smiles at the camera, holding a bottle close to her face. The background is filled with stacks of boxes and industrial equipment. (8) The final sequence returns to the outdoor street scene. The three women are gathered together, talking excitedly and laughing. They wave their hands at the camera in a goodbye gesture as the camera pans slightly to catch their expressions. The urban background remains consistent with the opening.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 這一次. [Slogan]: 訪廠行程 - 保養品工廠. (2) [Variety]: 原料斗檢驗. [Subtitle]: 這邊是品檢室. (3) [Subtitle]: 所有原料都會來這邊作品檢. (4) [Subtitle]: 裡面有操作台. (5) [Subtitle]: 我會實際用現在衛福部比較建議的四大菌種去做培養. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後確定都沒有事了. (7) [Subtitle]: 他才可以進場. (8) [Subtitle]: 我有認真聽. (9) [Variety]: 層層把關 請安心!. (10) [Variety]: 内料攪拌. [Variety]: 添加滿滿功效成分. (11) [Variety]: 配方打樣. [Variety]: 內料安定性: 黏度測量. (12) [Variety]: 低溫測試. [Variety]: -10度~45度 內料安定性測試. (13) [Variety]: 自動化裝罐. (14) [Variety]: 檢查、鎖瓶、上蓋. (15) [Variety]: 雙重檢查. (16) [Variety]: 效期噴印、包裝. [Subtitle]: 準備交到你們手上囉 <3. (17) [Subtitle]: 以上就是我們這一次的保養品篇. (18) [Subtitle]: 下次見 拜拜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 main male factory guide, 2 female companions, 2 factory workers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main female character wears a beige Adidas cap and a white zip-up hoodie. The male guide wears a black polo shirt, glasses, and later a white lab coat and hairnet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a busy Taiwanese street with city signage and a clean-room factory environment featuring lab equipment, stainless steel tanks, and conveyor belts.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic female vocal intro accompanied by an upbeat pop BGM with a clear 124 BPM electronic beat. The voice exhibits high arousal and positive valence. (2) A digital 'pop' SFX triggers a transition. A calm, professional male narrative voice explains the lab process, layered over the continuous BGM and low indoor room tone. (3) A distinct liquid splashing sound is heard as the visuals show pouring, followed by the faint mechanical whirring of a mixer. (4) A metallic 'click' and digital beep from testing equipment punctuate the BGM. (5) A series of rhythmic mechanical clicks and whooshes sync with the movement of the automated bottling machine. The BGM remains the dominant acoustic layer. (6) A high-pitched female giggle and enthusiastic exclamation interrupt the technical sounds. (7) Multiple female voices join in a chaotic but joyful chatter and laughter session, accompanied by a final 'ding' sound effect as the BGM fades out during the sign-off.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the rigorous and professional manufacturing and quality control process of the 'Haha Baby' skincare brand, aiming to build consumer trust through behind-the-scenes transparency.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically visits the factory of the brand 'Haha Baby', shows products, and includes promotional taglines.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency editing and bright color tones to maintain a modern, social-media-friendly aesthetic while delivering educational content.
